overrideDescriptionKey.english: Add a random equipment with [ephemeral] to your hand and apply -[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember].
overrideDescriptionKey.french: Ajoute à votre main un équipement aléatoire avec [ephemeral] et applique -[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember].
overrideDescriptionKey.german: Füge deiner Hand eine zufällige Ausrüstung mit [ephemeral] hinzu und wende -[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember] an.
overrideDescriptionKey.russian: В вашу руку добавляется [ephemeral] карта случайного снаряжение. У неё будет -[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember].
overrideDescriptionKey.portuguese: Adiciona um equipamento aleatório com [ephemeral] à sua mão e aplica -[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese: 随机将一张带有[ephemeral]的装备卡加入你的手牌并施加-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]。
overrideDescriptionKey.spanish: Añade a tu mano un equipo aleatorio con [ephemeral] y -[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 將隨機[ephemeral]裝備加入手牌並施加-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]。
overrideDescriptionKey.korean: [ephemeral] 효과가 있는 무작위 장비를 패에 추가하고, -[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]을 적용합니다.
overrideDescriptionKey.japanese: 手札に[ephemeral]のランダムな装備品を追加し、-[effect0.upgrade.costreduction][ember]を付与する。
